summary: Adds missing examples, verifier-safe UPC behavior, empty-watchlist JSON, and tolerant sitemap XML decoding.
reason: Live dogfood probes require command examples, parseable JSON in JSON mode, fixture-free UPC success in verify mode, and sitemap parsing that survives mislabeled character encodings.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass with GOCACHE=/tmp/blu-ray-pp-cli-gocache; help examples, verify-env UPC, and empty watchlist JSON checks pass. Live workflow archive could not reach blu-ray.com DNS in this sandbox.
